description: Maps 15 core metrics to PulseRealms telemetry events and computed fields

metrics.name: Correctness Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of in-game questions answered correctly

metrics.name: Response Time
metrics.description: Time between question presentation and answer submission (ms)
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:76 — responseTimeMs included in question_answered payload

metrics.name: Speed-Accuracy Profile
metrics.description: Joint classification of response time and correctness
metrics.computation: Classify each answer: fast+correct='fluent', slow+correct='deliberate', fast+wrong='guessing', slow+wrong='struggling'. Session profile = dominant category.

metrics.name: Play Time
metrics.description: Total time spent in game session
metrics.codeReference: telemetry.js:27 — startedAt = Date.now() in beginSession(); telemetry.js:47 — endedAt = Date.now() in endSession()

metrics.name: Return Rate
metrics.description: Number of distinct sessions per student over time period
metrics.computation: COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) per student per time window from telemetry.getAllSessions()
metrics.codeReference: telemetry.js:58-60 — getAllSessions() returns all stored sessions

metrics.name: Strategy Classification
metrics.description: Player's dominant play style based on role choice and action distribution
metrics.computation: Categorize by most frequent actionType: attack/powerStrike='aggressive', heal/shield='support', buildBarrier/deployTurret='builder'. Cross-reference with role selection.
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:97-104 — telemetry.event('action_performed', { actionType, role }); constants.js:39-46 — ACTION_IDS enum

metrics.name: Action Variation Index
metrics.description: Diversity of actions taken (Shannon entropy normalized to 0-1)
metrics.computation: Shannon entropy of actionType distribution / log2(n_action_types). 0 = always same action, 1 = perfectly diverse.
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:98 — actionType captured per action; constants.js:39-46 — 6 possible action types

metrics.name: Role Choice
metrics.description: Which role the student selects at match start
metrics.computation: Direct capture from session metadata at game start
metrics.codeReference: telemetry.js:24-29 — beginSession(meta) stores meta; constants.js:33-37 — ROLE_IDS enum

metrics.name: Teammate Interactions
metrics.description: Count of actions targeting allied team members (heal, shield)
metrics.computation: COUNT where effectType IN ('heal', 'shield', 'barrier') — indicates prosocial actions toward teammates
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:97-104 — action_performed event with effectType; combatSystem.js:23-36 — heal/shield/barrier effects

metrics.name: Heal Actions Given
metrics.description: Count of heal actions performed on allies

metrics.name: Shield Actions Given
metrics.computation: COUNT where actionType IN ('shield', 'buildBarrier') AND success=true
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:27-34 — shield and barrier effects; constants.js:44-45 — SHIELD, BUILD_BARRIER

metrics.name: Persistence After Failure
metrics.description: Ratio of continued engagement after incorrect answers
metrics.computation: After each incorrect answer, check if student continues to perform actions within 30 seconds. persistence = actions_after_failure / total_failures. High value = resilient.
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:71-79 — question_answered with correct field; gameState.js pushPulseRecord tracks {correct, responseTimeMs} sequence

metrics.name: Performance Under Pressure
metrics.description: Accuracy when HP is low (stress indicator for emotional regulation)
metrics.computation: Compare correctness_rate when cumulative damage > 60% of baseHp (120) vs. when healthy. Large accuracy drop under pressure = low emotional regulation.
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:107-113 — damage_taken event with amount; constants.js:21 — baseHp: 120

metrics.name: Response Consistency
metrics.description: Standard deviation of response times within a session
metrics.computation: STDDEV(responseTimeMs) across all question_answered events in session. Low stddev = consistent pace. High stddev = variable attention.
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:76 — responseTimeMs in every question_answered event

metrics.name: Learning Velocity
metrics.description: Rate of accuracy change across a session (early vs. late questions)
metrics.computation: Split session questions into first-half and second-half by timestamp. learning_velocity = accuracy_second_half - accuracy_first_half. Positive = improving within session.
metrics.codeReference: combatSystem.js:71-79 — question_answered events with ts and correct; questionEngine.js:92-111 — adaptive difficulty adjusts based on correctStreak/wrongStreak

payload.subject: string — 'math' | 'science' | 'general'
payload.actionType: string — which ability triggered the question
